steps.t: Fish can be found in the nets that run along the river-bank of the river Ringló. You should collect fish from the nets.
The village of Ethring is located in Ringló Vale. Investigate what washed up on the river-bank in Ethring.
The body is in the village of Ethring. You should examine the body.
Laerind is located in the village of Ethring. You should tell Laerind of what you have seen.
